## What does this PR do?

<!-- Describe your changes in 1-2 sentences -->

## Type

- [ ] 📱 New device data
- [ ] 📖 New/updated guide or block
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix
- [ ] ✨ New feature
- [ ] 🧹 Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] 📦 Dependency update

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] Tested locally with `npm run dev`
- [ ] YAML files are valid (no syntax errors)
- [ ] No hardcoded strings — all tags/regions/questions use dictionary slugs
- [ ] Blocks don't contain step numbers (the engine adds them)

## Device Data PRs Only

- [ ] Each variant has the correct `model` (exact model number)
- [ ] Each variant has its own `soc` if different from device default
- [ ] Locked variants have `locked_bootloader` tag
- [ ] Sources provided (XDA thread, personal verification, etc.)
